hero.subtitle: Know your gaps. Practice right. Interview with confidence.
hero.description: Paste a job description + upload your CV. AI identifies skill gaps and generates a personalized roadmap with mock interview questions.

pasteUpload.title: PASTE & UPLOAD
pasteUpload.desc: Drop your JD and CV. We parse both instantly.

gapAnalysis.title: GAP ANALYSIS
gapAnalysis.desc: AI compares your skills against the job's demands.

practice.title: PRACTICE
practice.desc: Get mock interview Qs tailored to your gaps.

skillGap.title: SKILL GAP ANALYZER
skillGap.desc: Paste a job description and upload your CV (or enter skills manually). AI outputs existing skills, missing skills, and a resource roadmap.

mockInterview.title: MOCK INTERVIEW
mockInterview.desc: Choose a role (Frontend, Backend, PM, Designer...). AI generates questions from the JD. Answer via text or audio. AI scores and gives feedback.

dashboard.title: DASHBOARD
dashboard.desc: Track your practice history, monitor per-skill progress, and view score trends over time.
